projectDescription: A full-stack personal portfolio and digital product storefront built with Next.js, featuring a cyberpunk aesthetic, integrated e-commerce with Stripe/PayPal, license key management, user authentication, and a comprehensive admin dashboard.
keyFeatures: Animated portfolio sections: Hero with matrix rain, About, Skills carousel, Projects grid, Contact form
3D visual effects using Three.js and React Three Fiber
Framer Motion animations with cyberpunk/matrix aesthetic
Integrated digital product shop with Stripe and PayPal checkout
License key generation and management for digital products
Coupon/discount system with percentage and fixed-amount options
User authentication with NextAuth.js (credentials + OAuth providers)
Full-featured admin dashboard with revenue charts, order management, and customer tracking
Support ticket system with live chat and admin responses
Seasonal effects and site settings configurable from admin panel
publicApiSurface: POST /api/contact — Send a contact form message via email
POST /api/checkout — Create a Stripe checkout session
GET /api/download — Serve licensed digital product files
POST /api/webhooks/stripe — Stripe webhook handler for order fulfillment
